goal: Ask-a-Question selection board: kill the empty halo (cards packed centre), give daily+question+celtic a deal-one-by-one animation, and make the TH shuffle label สับไพ่-only
done: (1) Question board spacing: the @media(max-width:640px) rule in css/question.css made #question-card-board flex:1 1 auto + align-content:center, so the 4x3 grid of tiny (max 52px) cards floated in the middle of a ballooned column with a halo of empty space. Replaced with a COMPACT grid mirroring the Daily board: flex:0 0 auto, max-width:320px, align-content:start, card-slot max-width:clamp(40px, (100dvh-420px)/6, 64px); the cta-row's margin-top:auto still pins Continue to the bottom (same as daily). (2) Deal animation: added animateDealStack() in js/main.js — snaps every card into a face-down pile at board centre then deals each out to its slot staggered (the founder's 'dealing onto the table' feel). Routed daily+question(profile 'daily') AND full(celtic) to it, replacing the old fan-out animateDailyShuffleSlots. Stagger 70ms on small boards (12 cards ~1.2s); tightened to max(14, 1100/n) on big boards so the 40-card Celtic deal finishes ~1.5s (<2s). On re-shuffle the prior spread still collects to the middle first (animateCollectSlots / animateSimpleCollect in render). (3) TH label: th/daily.html + th/full.html showed 'สับไพ่ · Shuffle' (bilingual) -> removed the separator + English span; th/question-draw.html showed wrong word 'สลับไพ่' -> 'สับไพ่' (text + aria-label). EN buttons unchanged ('Shuffle').
root_cause: Question mobile board used a flex-grow + centre-align layout with a small card cap, so it never filled the board like Daily; daily+question dealt via a fan-out, not a deal; TH buttons carried English + a wrong verb.
fix: Compact daily-mirrored grid + larger card clamp; new animateDealStack deal-from-centre routed to all three boards; TH labels normalized to สับไพ่.
verified: headless 390x844: question board now a compact full-width 4x3 grid under the Shuffle pill, Continue pinned bottom (matches daily, no halo)
headless TH question-draw: shuffle pill reads ↻ สับไพ่ only

goal: Show a celebratory pop-up whenever Meow Coins are earned (founder: 'I don't get any coin from daily reading' = coins WERE granted but silently), + an on-brand coin image
done: Root cause of 'no coins from daily reading': coins ARE granted (progress.js trackCompletedDailyReading -> grantDailyReading, +5 once/day) but there was NO visible feedback and the chip updates silently, so it felt like nothing happened. Added showCoinPopup() in js/meow-coin.js: a queued, centred, dimmed-backdrop pop-up with the coin art, +N, unit, and a bilingual reason label (daily login / daily reading / achievement unlocked / new deck). Fired from grantMeowCoins() on every REAL mint only (idempotent no-ops stay silent), so it triggers for the +5 login, +5 daily reading, +20 achievement, +20 deck unlock. Queue plays back-to-back earns sequentially. Auto-dismiss ~2.2s or tap. CSS .mt-coin-pop* in css/styles.css (coin spins in, prefers-reduced-motion respected). Upgraded assets/meow-coin.svg from a paw-print to a clearer cat-face gold coin (ears+face+whiskers) that reads at both 24px chip and 76px popup.
fix: Celebratory popup at the single mint point (grantMeowCoins) so all earn paths surface; no change to the grant logic itself.
verified: headless poptest: dimmed overlay + ivory card + cat-face coin + '+20 / Meow Coins / Achievement unlocked!'
headless shop load: balance pill shows 5 (daily-login mint fired end-to-end)

goal: Populate the Meow Coin Shop with buyable deck cards (was empty 'coming soon') and make a purchase actually unlock the deck
done: Shop was empty because SHOP_DECKS=[] awaiting 'not-live deck slugs'. Populated SHOP_DECKS from the real registry: every deck in data.js DECKS except the free default moonmallow (10 decks), back art = ${CDN}/${id}/00-back-200.webp (the 200px thumb the selection boards already use, so guaranteed on CDN). Wired purchases into the real unlock truth: added getPurchasedDecks/isPurchasedDeck/purchaseDeck in js/data.js (localStorage meowtarot_purchased_decks) and made canUnlockDeck() return true for purchased decks (BEFORE the sign-in gate — the coin spend IS the entitlement, matching the client-side coin MVP). shop.js buyDeck() now calls purchaseDeck() (deck becomes selectable in Your Deck) and isOwned()=canUnlockDeck() so streak/gift/purchased decks all show 'Owned' and only locked ones are buyable.
fix: Drive the shop off DECKS + a real purchased-decks store that canUnlockDeck honours, instead of an empty list + a dead shop-only owned flag.
verified: headless shop.html: deck grid renders (Veila Tarot, Boba Oracle, ...) with CDN back-200 art + 100-coin buy buttons + balance pill
filed: halloween deck is declared in decks.json (13 decks) but has ZERO source art on the CDN -> no -200 thumbs possible; it's also NOT in app DECKS so not in the shop. Upstream: founder must upload halloween full-res art to R2 before it can ship.
siam-paws (also decks.json-only, not in DECKS) now HAS full -200 thumbs on CDN (157 generated this session) but is not wired into the app DECKS registry/shop yet
Meow Coin wallet + purchased-decks are client-side localStorage; server-authoritative ownership is the planned hardening
